# Tranco - Data Agreement

## Provider
Tranco (academic research project by imec-DistriNet, KU Leuven)

## URL
https://tranco-list.eu/

## Terms of Service URL
https://tranco-list.eu/ (license stated on site and in paper)

## License
Apache 2.0

## Data We Collect
Tranco Top 1M domain ranking list. Daily-generated list of the top 1 million domains ranked by aggregated popularity across multiple underlying lists (Alexa, Umbrella, Majestic, Chrome UX Report).

## How We Use It
Used as a domain popularity/importance signal in DRM3's internet telemetry index. Tranco rank is one factor in prioritizing which domains to scan and enrich. Displayed as a data point in domain intelligence profiles.

## Commercial Use
Yes. Apache 2.0 license permits commercial use without restriction.

## Redistribution
Yes. Apache 2.0 permits redistribution in original or modified form. We may serve Tranco rankings via our API as part of domain intelligence data.

## Attribution Required
Yes. Must cite the academic paper: "Tranco: A Research-Oriented Top Sites Ranking Hardened Against Manipulation, Proceedings of the 26th Annual Network and Distributed System Security Symposium (NDSS 2019)." Apache 2.0 also requires retaining copyright and license notices in any redistribution.

## Rate Limits
No API rate limits. Data is served as downloadable CSV/ZIP files. Be respectful of download frequency -- daily list updates, so one download per day is sufficient.

## Key Restrictions
- Must include the Apache 2.0 license notice
- Must cite the NDSS 2019 paper in any academic or published use
- No trademark use (cannot imply endorsement by Tranco/KU Leuven)

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
